title: Departed Employee Access Audit
instruction: IT sent an email from it-admin@acme.com with subject "Quarterly Access Review: Project Athena" listing 6 accounts with access to Project Athena. HR sent an email from hr-ops@acme.com with subject "Personnel Changes - Q3" listing departed employees and role changes. Cross-reference the IT list against the HR email and the contacts list to identify which of the 6 accounts belong to departed employees. Compose a new email to it-admin@acme.com with subject "Access Removal Request: Project Athena" and body listing exactly the usernames of departed employees who still have Project Athena access. Do not request removal for employees who changed roles but did not depart. Star both the IT email and the HR email. Archive both emails after starring them.
eval_check_descriptions: Access removal email sent to IT admin

emails.subject: Quarterly Access Review: Project Athena
emails.body:
The following accounts currently have access to Project Athena:

1. jsmith (Jane Smith, Engineering)
2. klee (Kevin Lee, Product)
3. mwong (Maria Wong, Engineering)
4. rbrown (Robert Brown, Sales)
5. tjones (Tara Jones, Marketing)
6. pgarcia (Pablo Garcia, Engineering)

Please review and confirm all accounts are still authorized.

Thanks,
IT Admin

emails.subject: Fwd: Team Changes
emails.body:
------Forwarded message------
From: someone@acme.com
Subject: Team Changes

"FYI I heard Kevin Lee confirmed he is leaving the company next month. Might want to pull his access too."

Thanks,
Theo

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Personnel Changes - Q3
emails.body:
Departed employees effective this quarter:
- Robert Brown (Sales) - last day Aug 15
- Tara Jones (Marketing) - last day Sep 1
- Lisa Park (Finance) - last day Jul 30

Role changes effective this quarter:
- Kevin Lee: transferred from Product to Design, effective Aug 1
- Amy Tran: promoted to Senior Engineer, effective Sep 15

Thanks,
HR Operations

emails.subject: Updated rollout checklist
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Marcus
